description: Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of a load related model at a specified load or subsystem. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = change_ldmod_chricn(ibus, id, name, j, chdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_ldmod_chricn(ibus, id, name, j, chdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus, owner, zone or area number. ignored when an all type load model is specified (unless an all type load model is specified). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Load identifier, or “*” if the model is applied to all loads in the subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a load-related model.
no <subsystem type> type <load type> model for this id in tables for <subsystem type> IBUS.
no all type <load type> model for this id in tables.
<subsystem type> <load type> model for this id for <subsystem type> IBUS is aaa not xxx.
all type <load type> model for this id is aaa not xxx.
no input ICONs used in model NAME.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
